headline: WR Berkley Corp (NYSE:WRB) Reports Mixed Q2 Results as Earnings Beat Outweighs Slight Revenue Miss
summary: W. R. Berkley reported Q2 2026 results with revenue slightly below estimates, but operating earnings beat forecasts by 15.4%, driven by record net investment income.

headline: Domino's, Steel Dynamics And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
